generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements from physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib, TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib, TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360, GantryLib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Motion simulation for crane behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for system control and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for code dissemination"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage for operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker for messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for geometric representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModelingService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling tool for C4 Model visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureVisualizationService
]

instance MkDocs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Documentation tool for digital twin system"
    DTDFVocab:enables DocumentationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes movement paths using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes dynamic simulations of crane's behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides optimal control for gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical operational data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes operational data for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight, SimulationInsight, PredictionInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates system behavior through bi-directional data flow"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance CADModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creates CAD models for geometric representation"
    DTDFVocab:provides CADModelInsight
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes system architecture using C4 Model"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureInsight
]

instance DocumentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides system documentation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DocumentationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed movement paths for crane operation"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation results of crane behavior"
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control parameters for crane system"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for analysis and monitoring"
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis for system behavior"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of system behavior through bi-directional data flow"
]

instance CADModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation"
]

instance ArchitectureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "C4 Model architecture visualization"
]

instance DocumentationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System documentation for digital twin"
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and processing"
]

instance CranePhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical crane system environment"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, Arduino
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are issued through the Human Machine Interface (HMI), processed by the Control Application (Python), and executed via the Physical Crane Interface. Specific command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, and execution confirmation details are not provided."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architecture visualization with context and container diagrams, employing containerization technologies for deployment and following an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker is used for signaling between services including Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service. TimescaleDB serves as the data storage. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software runs on a personal computer, and the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard C4 Containers are containerized with Docker. Specific computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and deployment models are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standards are used for the digital twin model in the Air Quality Management exemplar, while the Lab Scale Gantry Crane employs the C4 Model for software architecture visualization."
]
